zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Fettiplace於1397年出生在英國波克夏格亞特 雪福德時，他的父親Henry Fettiplace62歲，母親Beatrice Archfield Blackmore38歲。他於1418年10月19日之後與Beatrice Pinto結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他在英國英格蘭奧可福爾被列為sheriff。他去世於1442年之後在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國波克夏易亞斯特 雪福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Fettiplace于1397年出生在英国波克夏格亞特 雪福德时，他的父亲Henry Fettiplace62岁，母亲Beatrice Archfield Blackmore38岁。他于1418年10月19日之后与Beatrice Pinto结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他在英国英格兰奧可福爾被列为sheriff。他去世于1442年之后在他的家乡，埋葬在英国波克夏易亞斯特 雪福德。

nameMeanings.name: Fettiplace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: nickname from the Anglo-Norman French phrase fete place ‘make room’, perhaps for an usher.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Fettiplace was born in 1397, in Great Shefford, Berkshire, England, his father, Henry Fettiplace, was 62 and his mother, Beatrice Archfield Blackmore, was 38. He married Beatrice Pinto after 19 October 1418. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. His occupation is listed as sheriff in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. He died after 1442, in his hometown, and was buried in East Shefford, Berkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Fettiplace est né en 1397, à Great Shefford, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry Fettiplace, avait 62 ans et sa mère, Beatrice Archfield Blackmore, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Beatrice Pinto après 19 octobre 1418. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé après 1442, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à East Shefford, Berkshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Fettiplace 1397 in Great Shefford, Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Fettiplace 62 und seine Mutter Beatrice Archfield Blackmore 38. Er hat nach 19. Oktober 1418 Beatrice Pinto geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. sein Beruf ist als sheriff in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb nach 1442 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in East Shefford, Berkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Fettiplace è nato il nel 1397 nel Great Shefford, Berkshire, England, il suo padre, Henry Fettiplace, aveva 62 anni e il suo madre, Beatrice Archfield Blackmore, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Beatrice Pinto dopo il 19 ottobre 1418. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. La sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff nel Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì dopo il 1442, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a East Shefford, Berkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Fettiplaceが1397年にイギリスバークシュアイアグレアト シェフォードで生まれた時，父Henry Fettiplaceは62歳，母Beatrice Archfield Blackmoreは38歳であった。1418年10月19日以後にBeatrice Pintoと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。イギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアでの職業はsheriffと記録されている。彼は1442年以後に故郷で死去し，イギリスバークシュアイアエアスト シェフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Fettiplace(이)가 1397년 영국 버크실르 그리트 셰퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Fettiplace(은)는 62세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice Archfield Blackmore(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1418년 10월 19일 이후 Beatrice Pinto(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 sheriff이었다. 그는 1442년 이후 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 버크실르 이스트 셰퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Fettiplace nasceu em 1397, em Great Shefford, Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Fettiplace, tinha 62 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice Archfield Blackmore, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrice Pinto após 19 de outubro de 1418. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Sua profissão aparece como sheriff em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu após 1442, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em East Shefford, Berkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Fettiplace родился в 1397 г. в местности грит шеффорд, биркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry Fettiplace было 62 года, а матери, которую звали Beatrice Archfield Blackmore, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrice Pinto после 19 октябрь 1418 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына.  Он работал по профессии sheriff в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер после 1442 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности эаст шеффорд, биркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Fettiplace nació en 1397, en Great Shefford, Berkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Fettiplace, tenía 62 años y su mamá, Beatrice Archfield Blackmore, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Beatrice Pinto después de 19 de octubre de 1418. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Su ocupación registrada era sheriff en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió después de 1442, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en East Shefford, Berkshire, Inglaterra.
